headline: Omnicom Group (OMC) Acquires Interpublic Group as Ariel Fund Backs Combined Advertising Giant
summary: Ariel Investments, an investment management company, released its “Ariel Appreciation Fund” fourth-quarter 2025 investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. The fund advanced +3.04% in the fourth quarter of 2025, outperforming the Russell Midcap Value Index’s +1.42% and the Russell Midcap Index’s +0.16% returns as U.S. equities posted a modest gain […]
